title: Fantastic Moroccan Oysters Seffa
description: Savory Moroccan dish featuring oysters and tempering chocolate, kosher friendly and perfect for meal prep. This seffa dish is a unique blend of flavors and textures.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the vermicelli pasta according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, oysters, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Melt the tempering chocolate in a double boiler and stir into the pasta mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
